problem_restatement: Finish independently replayable observation, queue, and evidence contracts without widening the frame, then authorize only the product corrections that return cleanup, regression, and style walls to zero.
inbound_signal: DKR-0 dispositions are independently accepted but its checkpoint remains blocked; DKR-3 and DKR-4 behavior hold while their checkpoints fail freshness or lifecycle facts; DKR-5 allows lexical path escape and wrong-hypothesis publication.
decision_delta: Accepted only the DKR-0 keep, reshape, and remove map. Acknowledged one touched ACP regression and the raw style findings. Dispatched fresh evidence-only DKR-3 v4, DKR-4 v3, and DKR-5 v2 repairs. Kept all product changes paused.
dkr_decision: Continue the three bounded repairs and their cross-validation. Do not promote CKRs or PKRs and do not record the implementation corridor until DKR-3 through DKR-5 are accepted under the frame's ten-minute wall freshness.
evidence_delta: Objective remains 0 of 16. DKR-0 mechanical and semantic disposition coverage is 58 paths, 90 concepts, and 12 negative mutations. DKR-3 behavior is 12 of 12. DKR-4 behavior is 8 of 8. DKR-5 has two semantic bypasses and three breached walls.
expected_effect: Produce one accepted architecture set whose implementation plan can remove every current breaker without adding hidden effects, public worker lifecycle methods, or unsafe publication paths.
assumptions_at_risk: The DKR-3 v4 freshness-only repair remains semantically identical to accepted v3 behavior
The DKR-4 v3 repair can remove stale lifecycle claims without changing bounded queue behavior
Canonical path containment and hypothesis identity binding close both DKR-5 bypasses before any adapter call or publication

unexpected_results.claim: A passing fixed fixture denominator proves repository containment.
A verified verdict necessarily targets the hypothesis being published.
unexpected_results.verdict: rejected; wrong hypothesis identity publishes once

anti_goal_violation_review.verdict: breaking acknowledged; correction corridor not yet recorded

hallucination_sweep.verdict: rejected; checkpoint freshness and source facts remain governing claims

missing_context_sweep.verdict: rejected; it is separately classified and excluded while the confirmed Codex defect remains counted

alternatives_considered: Accept passing behavior while ignoring checkpoint contradictions
Start product corrections before the complete DKR set is accepted
Repair only the rejected checkpoint and leave semantic denial gaps untested
